transcript: Speaker A (AI): Mera haath pakdo [Hold my hand]. Hold my hand. Speaker B (Human): Hold my hand. Speaker A (AI): Dhairya rakho [Have patience]. Have patience. Speaker B (Human): Have patience. Speaker A (AI): Upar jao [Go upstairs]. Go upstairs. Speaker B (Human): Go upstairs. Speaker A (AI): Sone jao [Go to bed]. Go to bed. Speaker B (Human): Go to bed. Speaker A (AI): Mujhe tumpe gussa aa raha hai [I'm angry with you]. I'm angry with you. Speaker B (Human): I'm angry with you. Speaker A (AI): Mujhe nahi pata [I don't know]. I don't know. Speaker B (Human): I don't know. Speaker C (Voiceover): MySivi app par mere saath Hindi mein baat karke Angrezi seekhein, woh bhi sirf ek rupaye mein [Learn English by talking to me in Hindi on the MySivi app, that too for just one rupee]. Mere saath kabhi bhi, jitni der chahein, utni der practice karein [Practice with me anytime, for as long as you want]. Bolna, vyakaran, vakya banana aur sahi shabdon ka istemal, sab kuch ek hi jagah par [Speaking, grammar, sentence formation, and correct word usage, all in one place]. Speaker D (Voiceover): Install Now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app].
on_screen_text: Mera haath pakdo [Hold my hand] / Hold my hand. Dhairya rakho [Have patience] / Have patience. Upar jao [Go upstairs] / Go upstairs. Sone jao [Go to bed] / Go to bed. Mujhe tumpe gussa aa raha hai [I'm angry with you] / I'm angry with you. Mujhe nahi pata [I don't know] / I don't know. MySivi. MySivi Premium: 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1. Then ₹299/month. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access. MySivi English speaking app. Install Now.
summary: An AI avatar and a human learner demonstrate English translation and pronunciation practice in a split-screen format. The ad promotes the MySivi app's AI English teacher, offering a 3-day premium trial for ₹1, and ends with a call to action to download the app.
